Submit your CV today

In response to Covid 19, Bloom Learning Technologies, which started out as Bloom Recruitment in 2012 has set up an introduction service for LnD job seekers to companies looking for LnD talent.

For LnD Leaders, are offering an introduction service for $0% fee, as well as free advice on team reconstruction and 'Learning as a Service' (LAAS).

We will trial this for May June 2020.
